name: balloon
description: Home of deflate & inflate: satire-grade LinkedIn deflation (and inflation), backed by real persuasion research.

plugins.name: balloon
plugins.description: Deflates LinkedIn and corporate thought-leadership posts back to what actually happened — and inflates plain facts back into the genre with /balloon:inflate. A plain rewrite, a brutal one-liner, a 💩 bullshit meter, and the manipulation tells — each grounded in real persuasion research.
